assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 26-35: 'Deployment Context Lookup' section extracts from the Source Repositories table and shows rhtpa-backend with Deployment Context = customer-shipped. Line 35 confirms: 'Deployment context for rhtpa-backend: `customer-shipped`'.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 26-37: The deployment context lookup maps the component to rhtpa-backend and identifies customer-shipped. Line 37 explicitly states: 'This deployment context is recorded as part of the extracted CVE metadata and will be used in Step 8 (Remediation) to generate coordination guidance in the remediation task descriptions.'

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: All four remediation tasks contain a '##### Coordination Guidance' subsection nested under '#### Implementation Notes'. Task 1 (line 52), Task 2 (line 101), Task 3 (line 169), Task 4 (line 222). Each contains 'This component is shipped to customers' guidance text.

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: All four Coordination Guidance sections contain the exact text: 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.' All three required items (CVE assignment, advisory preparation, formal disclosure) are explicitly mentioned at lines 54, 103, 171, 224.
